mapper.sql: s.id, s.lot_id, s.work_order_id, l.lot_number, w.wo_number, s.parameter_name, s.subgroup_no, s.sample_values, s.x_bar, s.range_value, s.ucl, s.cl, s.lcl, s.usl, s.lsl, s.cp, s.cpk, s.measured_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM spc_data s LEFT JOIN lots l ON l.id = s.lot_id LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.id = s.work_order_id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spc_data ( id, lot_id, work_order_id, parameter_name, subgroup_no, sample_values, x_bar, range_value, ucl, cl, lcl, usl, lsl, cp, cpk, measured_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{lotId}, #{workOrderId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameterName}, #{subgroupNo}, #{sampleValues, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{xBar, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rangeValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ucl, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cl, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lcl, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{usl, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lsl, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cp, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cpk, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{measuredAt} )
